items.title: UN watchdog voices 'deep concern' as Iran reports new attacks on nuclear plant
items.dek: The International Atomic Energy Agency urges restraint to avoid a nuclear accident at Iran's Bushehr plant.
items.body: The International Atomic Energy Agency urges restraint to avoid a nuclear accident at Iran's Bushehr plant.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US arrests relatives of deceased Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
items.dek: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.
items.body: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
